positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene, featuring an array of oversized, bioluminescent fantasy flora and fauna. The central composition showcases a winding, crystalline path surrounded by exaggerated leaves and glowing mushrooms. Use a vibrant, deep jewel-tone color palette (emerald, sapphire, amethyst) with contrasting bright neon accents for the glow. Style should be a mix of Art Nouveau curvature and clean, modern vector illustration, emphasizing strong outlines and flat color blocks suitable for apparel screen printing. The mood is magical and serene. Studio lighting, high contrast, centered perspective. Highly detailed, print-ready, vector graphic, isolated on a clean background for mockups.
negative: blurry, amateur, poor composition, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, noise, artifacts, text, watermarks, logos, signatures, low resolution, gradient, photo-realistic, bokeh, depth of field
